title: Standardize RFC 8724 fragmentation
description: Synchronize the LICHEN SCHC ACK-on-Error profile and implementations. Define authoritative M=1/N=6/T=0 parameters, directional RuleIDs, WINDOW_SIZE, tile/All-1 strategy, ACK timing/encoding, bitmap compression/order, MIC placement, padding, retries, and capacity; add independent shared vectors; migrate Python, Rust, and Zephyr/C together; validate cross-language interoperability.
